# LeakSanitizer suppressions for the ASAN CI job.
#
# Narrow, library-scoped suppressions only. Leaks originating in pdo_duckdb's
# own code (duckdb_statement.c / duckdb_driver.c / duckdb_appender.c frames)
# are NOT suppressed and will fail CI.
#
# DuckDB allocates process-lifetime state during initialization (the extension
# registry, type catalogs, static singletons) that is intentionally never freed
# before exit. Those are out of this driver's control.
leak:libduckdb
# The prebuilt spatial extension bundles its own sqlite3/GDAL, which leak
# process-lifetime allocations at exit. Loaded only by the GEOMETRY test.
leak:spatial
